textByHashes.716e37c9794aedb4fbcab8935df7898da3ab7898: Hello there, can I help you?
textByHashes.987c68adaef146e652505de3633eca7a52edad8d: This is the town of Lumbridge my friend.
textByHashes.92ed10316ab5a35927d81ec2354ec5c8fa178e48: Aye, not too bad thank you. Lovely weather in Gielinor this fine day.
textByHashes.3787470d75c5b68d866aca33d21e3963da26164e: The state or condition of the atmosphere at a time and place, with respect to variables such as temperature, moisture, wind velocity, and barometric pressure.
textByHashes.562306360dbd675e18a34926dbe6aec95742e4c4: Not just a pretty face eh? Ha ha ha.
textByHashes.58e6277f7a054a97c5f2669a9d3647f282513a1d: What kind of quest are you looking for?
textByHashes.5816d154ed97bb8137d58c4101b7c90ab74acfd3: Hmm.. dangerous you say? What sort of creatures are you looking to fight?
textByHashes.020d859d1867ff38e47a4671bd9f8177308cd66b: You are a brave soul indeed.
textByHashes.ff14afb7a86dae9eeea7c7e4b8c7c3dd5a655b5b: Now that you mention it, I heard a rumour about a fortune-teller in Varrock who is rambling about some kind of greater evil.. sounds demon-like if you ask me.
textByHashes.12fff094052627d82fc80d6c3267b6a45fa9e55e: Perhaps you could check it out if you are as brave as you say?
textByHashes.1ea04893cc773f7c9200144505b7390eab02ce37: Well done! However I'm sure if you search around the world you will find more challenging foes to slay.
textByHashes.8e2042996874e3c535a5380636819f530cb4d47a: Ha ha. I personally don't believe in such things. However, there is a man in Draynor Village who has been scaring the village folk with stories of vampyres.
textByHashes.5657996b285468b5a5a118d0b4b5fea2476cafb0: He's named Morgan and can be found in one of the village houses. Perhaps you could see what the matter is?
textByHashes.1699e7249659bd760720f9e6b9eee6dfaf8da047: Yeah, yeah of course you did. Everyone knows vampyres are not real....
textByHashes.80ab4cd69ae0dfca234c762d0e851a8567d63211: You're not fooling anyone you know.
textByHashes.333b878c702ee5a107c8966e6e9d6b0845ff7ab5: Small? Small isn't really that dangerous though is it?
textByHashes.96ec3c4ecf2528b4cb8f74524f3712ef9f514ec6: Yes ok, point taken. Speaking of small monsters, I hear old Wizard Mizgog in the wizards' tower has just had all his beads taken by a gang of mischievous imps.
textByHashes.b6328ce6e9ae999e6335b3894d4e4996dee9cf08: Sounds like it could be a quest for you?
textByHashes.f133e6d28d7b9295acb8726075fe2568c7b8be2f: I can tell you about plenty of small easy tasks.
textByHashes.15d7229641f3a7364ef1655e3b53012adea16c84: The Lumbridge cook has been having problems, the Duke is confused over some strange talisman and on top of all that, poor lad Romeo in Varrock has girlfriend problems.
textByHashes.2f91bc0c9eadb1bf8a08b64527348ed227b351c7: It's funny really, the cook would forget his head if it wasn't screwed on. This time he forgot to get ingredients for the Duke's birthday cake.
textByHashes.404bf9087bbdf5eb89c8bbcb0363178c27d017d3: Perhaps you could help him? You will probably find him in the Lumbridge Castle kitchen.
textByHashes.c3345fa0eddacde270f4c2da08ae92c3bccf662c: Oh yes, so you have. I am sure the Duke will be pleased.
textByHashes.1ffd10993367cda9e07bfefb027d6b1f7624bbd6: Well the Duke of Lumbridge has found a strange talisman that no one seems to understand. Perhaps you could help him? You can probably find him upstairs in Lumbridge Castle.
textByHashes.0ad81458229ddf2c1ea9290814ad09347b254d27: Ah excellent. Thank you very much adventurer.
textByHashes.7fe340c9616fe73ebf1d9813e667afba11ee2571: Romeo in Varrock needs help with finding his beloved Juliet, you may be able to help him out.
textByHashes.bee508c432158c8f7e69198f4bb66025ba0a9b73: Unless of course you manage to find Juliet first in which case she has probably lost Romeo.
textByHashes.19d9fbe92dfee03cf99613859e701ebb491439a9: Yes you can't miss him, he's wandering aimlessly in the square.
textByHashes.f30a105ab6108ca7906953b672f6e4e40d96f7b4: Well.. ok.. well done... I think...
textByHashes.8c5ba01eeec2c39dee8d334a77018bfcd711b3be: Skills play a big part when you want to progress in knowledge throughout Gielinor. I know of a few skill- related quests that can get you started.
textByHashes.276dc3e256ca8b3235fccb0fff853b800de4365c: You may be able to help out Fred the farmer who is in need of someones crafting expertise.
textByHashes.bda97e3249ae65b252d33f1e25cd4ad15bdc7266: Or, there's always Doric the dwarf who needs an errand running for him?
textByHashes.e62edd2e338fb544acb561ae4d61400dcdae4fe8: You can find Fred next to the field of sheep in Lumbridge. Perhaps you should go and speak with him.
textByHashes.67722795b2dcab6fa3667ab7aa14551cb4b4890e: Lumbridge chickens do make good target practice.
textByHashes.f41e1eca52a06dbe3f198cd90b1fa6d0ede7b59a: You will have to wait until he isn't looking.
textByHashes.5198f82d88ce1326fb6d7cbb01f5f8c152f27a45: Doric the dwarf is located north of Falador. He might be able to help you with smithing. You should speak to him. He may let you use his anvils.
textByHashes.d4c275e6c9d6a20dd1e33f74ce3dc7c2d8856aba: Of course I do. Gielinor is a huge place you know, now let me think...
textByHashes.7d9eaccbe9c1aec8889a74afaab84c893d0dbbf9: Hetty the witch in Rimmington might be able to offer help in the ways of magical abilities..
textByHashes.24dd274de40d2acedf6f7b760b2250043030afd0: Also, pirates are currently docked in Port Sarim, Where pirates are, treasure is never far away...
textByHashes.152ec1bf2fa3a6d6f7e5094a76796bf6870c4cb6: Or you could go help out Ernest who got lost in Draynor Manor, spooky place that.
textByHashes.670854c9158e43f9ed4b70effcd9a09f7529eb6e: Hetty the witch can be found in Rimmington, south of Falador. She's currently working on some new potions. Perhaps you could give her a hand? She might be able to offer help with your magical abilities.
textByHashes.404a6c91914a0d36b067ee81bd38b0240f6c58c8: RedBeard Frank in Port Sarim's bar, the Rusty Anchor, might be able to tell you about the rumored treasure that is buried somewhere in Gielinor.
textByHashes.859404eae3c43e4123de03e2d8e0cac9fdd41ce4: Yarr indeed my friend. A most excellent find.
textByHashes.5676a35cc84df65a29a7915f11d329ddabc555e2: The best place to start would be at the gate to Draynor Manor. There you will find Veronica who will be able to tell you more.
textByHashes.50add572bd23b6eb679328d6357d8a262e8cdd96: I suggest you tread carefully in that place; it's haunted.
textByHashes.47539ad20eaf4fdebf847a120a6e7f901cee4fdc: Yes, it does look like you need a hairdresser.
textByHashes.06c2993d104572ce9afa146fd57af18eb06edb6d: No problem. The hairdresser in Falador will probably be able to sort you out.
textByHashes.00582826c71e836f448cc05ce1bd6567ca726a71: The Lumbridge general store sells useful maps if you don't know the way.
textByHashes.4b3105adfac609d62069855ebe272c4cb5464552: I assume the sky is up..
textByHashes.27e2fba1c4ccc310b137ed86a34a5527f32750be: Yeah, unfortunately I don't seem to be able to look up.
textByHashes.4dafd2f1fdf0b9e261061a6cfe7fc1699e45c99a: It's not a stick! I'll have you know it's a very powerful staff!
textByHashes.99a4741f3c72f6574393121f01e71a620c617343: Um..It's a bit low on power at the moment..
textByHashes.b7b6ce3ea6f81f2855e031c78c361298951cce31: ...Ok it's a stick.. But only while I save up for a staff. Zaff in Varrock square sells them in his shop.
textByHashes.e75fe7c13096b21f4b2e5146117e8d843ced6a10: Are you asking for free stuff?
textByHashes.28d50ad0af34f54730c807895ebd9129c7476c45: No I do not have anything I can give you. If I did have anything of value I wouldn't want to give it away.
textByHashes.b4040df2e20ad4ed93491fa410e58d5199073682: I heard the wall collapsed or something. I don't know why. Perhaps you could get to the bottom of this mystery!
